title: dolicholobium oblongifolium
intro: Dolicholobium oblongifolium, also known as the oblong-leaved dolicholobium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of dolicholobium oblongifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
